feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SOAP API: Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) did not return result or show error via postman
entry.content:
Hi

I am trying to implement the "Post Incoming Payment" functionality in the API, for which I found two main SOAP APIs related to this function, namely Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) and Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous).

Regarding the Post part, after referring to the examples, it quickly completed creation normally; I was able to create DZ and DR type Journal Entries successfully and find them in the system. However, when I tried to use the Clearing API, I used two matching DR and DZ documents. Postman only returned "202 Accepted" and there were no further return values.

From the documentation, I learned that SAP should return a Confirmation request to indicate the final execution result. I set up a WebHook to receive any possible return requests, but I did not receive any requests. Moreover, when I tried to look for the execution results of this request within the system, I couldn’t find any error messages or detailed information about the execution results in the SOAP Error Log or Message Monitoring application.

What I want to know is: how can I view these specific execution results (in the SAP system or through API returns)? Is there an error in my approach to using the Clearing interface?

entry.title: CDS view not visible Code List Based on CDS View
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have created custom CDS View developed in ABAP ADT tool.  The view is not visible as Value Help View when I am trying to create in  custom fields and logic App (S4 HANA) . I have selected the type Code List Based on CDS View

Please advise what is missing

entry.title: Consuming a Third-Party SOAP Web Service in SAP Public Cloud via RAP
entry.content:
Dear All,

I hope this message finds you well.

In an SAP Public Cloud system, I am trying to consume a third-party SOAP web service using the RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming Model) framework.

While creating the destination, we encountered an error when providing the service URL directly.

I would like to understand the correct approach to follow if I were to use a Communication Scenario instead.

Unfortunately, I couldn't find any relevant resources on this topic. If anyone has experience with a similar case, your support would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Best regards.

entry.title: SearchHelp - Public Cloud Generate UI Service Table
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a custom table in a Public Cloud system.

I have some fields defined with custom domains and fixed values ​​and others defined with standard data elements (such as BUKRS or FAKT).

I published the view with Eclipse using the automatic procedure "Generate Abap Repository object". Tutorial here: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-rap100-generate-ui-service..html

When I launch the published service the fields linked to custom domains with fixed values ​​do not show an automatic searchhelp, the field is a normal text field without the possibility of seeing the list of declared fixed values.

Example fields with Fix Doman Value:

 

The same problems with BUKRS or FAKT data elements. In Bukrs case; I modified the Metadata Extension generated by the tool to insert the SearchHelp:

BUKRS I added this annotation:

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [ { entity: { name: 'I_CompanyCodeStdVH', element: 'CompanyCode' } }

But to find "I_CompanyCodeStdVH" isn't easy!

What is the correct or fastest way to:

a) determine the search-help values ​​linked to the standard data elements (usable and released for client use)? Is there a library with all the values ​​cataloged?

b) Is it not possible to use the automatic searchhelp of the fixed domain values? Should a particular annotation be added in the metadata Extension?

Thanks you

entry.title: Request for setting default field value in purchase orders
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are working in the S4/HANA Public Cloud environment and would like to configure default values for specific fields when creating a purchase order (PO). We are specifically looking to prefill fields such as:

- Company code 

- Purchasing group 

We have already reviewed the options under Set User Defaults, but these fields are either unavailable there or not taking effect during PO creation. For instance, i filled in "001" as default value for Purchasing group without any result.

Could you please advise us:

1. Whether it's possible to achieve this through configuration or user personalization in Public Cloud?

2. If not, what is the recommended way to set such default fields?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: PO custom delivery address not populating for limit line items
entry.content: We have a requirement to show custom delivery address corresponding to limit item of adobeform. However, when we added address using custom fields of  extension point MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM, the same is not getting in node of limit item but only purchase order item node. We cannot extend datasource as well.

entry.title: 有没有一个报表或者CDS，可以查看所有物料的标注价格、实际价格、库存数量、收发货数量
有没有一个报表或者CDS，可以查看所有物料的历史标准成本和实际成本
The use of Table J_1BBRANCH is not permitted in sap public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team , 

I am unable to use the table J_1BBRANCH not permitted need to fetch GSTIN detail from this table.

unable to add as inner join or as select query in the class and API state options is also not avaialable.

what is solution for this in Public cloud ?? is there any alternative.

entry.title: Adding a custom field in Condition Contract condition record screen (e.g., in transaction WCOCO)
entry.content:
Is there a way to add a custom field (say, for Scale group) to the Condition Contract condition record screen (in transaction WCOCO) for user input, but this field NEED NOT be part of the standard condition table key or used in the access sequence for pricing determination.

We are basically trying to achieve the functionality of scale group (which was available in ECC rebates) in S4 Condition contract condition records.

entry.title: Embed custom BTP workzone UI5 app in S/4HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I was wondering whether it was possible to embed a BTP workzone app in S/4HANA Public Cloud? We have customers who are on S/4HANA Public Cloud but have no reason aside from one app to make use of BTP workzone. Is it possible to embed a BTP workzone app to Public Cloud so that users don't need to navigate OR be redirected to workzone for the use of that one app?

I'm aware of the fact that you can create custom tiles which point to apps on BTP workzone, but these will redirect the user to the BTP workzone which in the case of our customers is bothersome for one single app.

 

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: How to Assign Business Partner to Communication System in S/4HANA Public Cloud Using CBO or ABAP?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, is it possible to assign a Business Partner to a Communication System using Custom Business Object (CBO) or ABAP (via In-App Extensibility)?

If so, what is the recommended approach or workaround to achieve this via coding?

Appreciate any guidance or examples.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Invoice Date Control While Creating Customer Invoice
entry.content:
We need to create a custom control while creating customer invoice based on invoice date entered in Create Billing Documents - VF01 screen. We tried to achieve it on SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER BADI however, the date entered in Create Billing Documents - VF01 screen is not coming in any of the changing parameters of this BADI. We wanted to call this value form another program in ABAP, however, in Public Cloud SAP does not allow us to call program from another program. Please guide me how can we proceed on this regards if we are mistaken at some point. 

Business Case : User created a customer invoice for the date 17.06.2025, and when a user try to create customer invoice for the past date after the first invoice system should not allow to create a customer invoice as it will break the rule of chronological customer invoice numbering & invoice date. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Having Trouble Uploading XSD File to "Define Statutory Report" Fiori App?
entry.content:
I'm encountering an issue when trying to upload an XSD file into the "Define Statutory Report" Fiori app. I'm using an XSD file generated from the "Maintain Form Template" app, but I receive the following error message:

"File YY1_XXX.xsd does not have any entry points. Upload a valid file."

Could anyone help me understand why this error is occurring and how to resolve it?

entry.title: Increase Alternative bank account number field S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have a question regarding the "Alternative Bank Account Number" field within the house bank connectivity.

Some of our companies manage several currency accounts under a single main account number. In such cases, the upload of account statements only works if the Alternative Bank Account Number field is populated with the specific account ID provided by the bank. Unfortunately, this field appears to be too short to accommodate the full value.

Is there a way to extend the length of this field?
Any insights, solutions, or experiences you could share would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

Kind regards, 
Merle

entry.title: Restrict values in value help of basic uom while creating in product master data
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have a requirement in which I have to show only certain values in Basic UoM value help as we are not using all UoM provided by standard SAP in maintain product master data ui5 application of S4 HANA Public cloud.

This has to be done in clean core means.
I couldn't find any relevant BADI to do this in public cloud.

It seems certain configurable apps that can achieve are also not available in public cloud.

Kindly help here.

Thanks and Regards,
Malika Bathla.

entry.title: How to Enable Mass Data Upload for a Custom Business Object in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have created a Custom Business Object (CBO) in SAP Public Cloud, using an Employee data table as an example. I have also added a custom catalog extension, and the CBO tile currently allows adding only one entry at a time. However, I need to enable mass data upload functionality directly within the CBO, without relying on external tools.

Could anyone share suggestions or step-by-step guidance on how to implement mass data upload for a Custom Business Object in SAP Public Cloud? Any insights or best practices would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: 未找到可用供应商的业务对象
entry.content:
需求：通过代码调用业务对象创建供应商，即 BP 的 FLVN01 FLVN01 角色

BP 的业务对象 i_businesspartnertp_3 中只提供了扩展角色功能，但是没有维护如 公司 和 采购组织层级数据。

单独查找供应商相关业务对象，只找到 I_SUPPLIERLISTTP_2 ，但是已经标记为废弃，是否有其他可用的业务对象，能创建和更新供应商的公司和采购层级数据？

entry.title: S4HPC - Clear Outgoing Payments: Journal Entry Payment Block BAdI
entry.content:
HI all.

In S4HANA Public Cloud while Clearing Outgoing Payments i need set up field Payment Block for JE automatically. 

Questions: 

  • Is there any appropriate BADI for it?
  • Where this field get stored for JE? Which CDS/API i can use to retrieve it in Developer Extensibility?

Steps to reproduce my scenario:

  • App: Clear Outgoing Payments - Manual Clearing -> Clear Open Items -> Make Posting against JE

  • When JE is posted, go to app: Manage Supplier Line Items -> i need field 'Item Payment Block' is set up = A

We can block payment manually, but how do it automatically via Developer Extensibility?

Regards

Vitali

entry.title: Standard apps add custom button in public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Team,
I’m working on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and I have a requirement to add a custom action button to a standard Fiori application. As we know, direct modification of standard apps is restricted in the public cloud.
Can anyone guide me on the possible extensibility options to achieve this?
Is there any supported way to add a custom button using Developer Extensibility or any?
If not directly possible, is there any standard app developed using RAP BO (Restful ABAP Programming Model) that supports custom action extensions?
Ideally, I want to add some custom button and logic behind that button.
